Motion To Arbitrate Plaintiff?S Individual Claim And Stay Representative Paga Claims Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HOMEAGLOW INC.'s Motion To Arbitrate Plaintiff'S Individual Claim And Stay Representative Paga Claims Pending Arbitration (Notice).

The "joint motion to arbitrate plaintiff's individual claim and stay representative PAGA claims pending arbitration" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
